summary.en-US: Alternative news aggregator — EN & FR RSS feeds

description.en-US:
Pluralis is a local-first RSS news reader with 33 curated alternative
media sources (26 EN + 7 FR). Features an e-ink optimized paged reader,
bookmarks, per-source browsing, and Substack paid content support.
No accounts, no tracking, fully offline-capable.

summary.en-US: Library client optimized for e-ink devices

description.en-US:
Fork of OpenLibe Extended with e-ink display optimizations for
comfortable reading on e-ink Android devices.
